CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local TriggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity --log(event) --log(TriggerBodyEntity) --log(TriggerBodyEntity.Name)
if TriggerBodyEntity == nil then return end
if self.Target ~= nil then log("사다리가 나타납니다.") --self.Target.Enable = true self.Target.Enable = not self.Target.Enable end
